fields.title: Add default result_schema to TaskType config
fields.description:
Allow task types to specify a default result_schema in settings.json.

Use case: The review task type should always return structured JSON output (findings, overall_correctness, etc.) without requiring the caller to specify result_schema every time.

Changes needed:
- Add result_schema field to TaskType interface
- Merge with per-call result_schema (per-call overrides default)
- Update normalization in registry.ts
- Update task-type-creation skill with example
